title: Industry & Educational Visits
content: Industry & Educational Visits Visit to Mohan Meakin Pvt. Limited,Solan, H.P. on 20th Jan.2026 Visit of an Expert to JUIT from Industry (Magbro Healthcare Pvt Ltd) on 15 February 2025 Visit of an Expert to JUIT from Industry (Minchy Food Product-Shimla) on 29 January 2025 Educational Trip to National Dairy Research Institute and IIWBR (Karnal, Haryana) from November 11-12, 2024 by the Department of BT and BI. Education Tour to IHBT and CSK, HPKV Palampur by the students of BT and BI Department from 13-16 March 2024 Visit of an Expert (Retd Director-Forensic Science Laboratory-Shimla) to JUIT on 07 February 2024.
